response.justification: Senior full-stack engineer with 15+ years of experience, currently working in a directly relevant stack (TypeScript, Node.js, React) and contributing to AI-agent infrastructure including MCP code generators — a strong match for the role's AI-agent requirement. Solid breadth across backend, frontend, databases, Docker, and cloud (AWS CDK), with a craftsmanship orientation (TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based development). Gaps in Nest.js and Vitest specifically, but the foundation is more than adequate to pick those up quickly.
strengths: Hands-on AI-agent and MCP tooling experience at current role
Deep TypeScript/Node.js/React background with AWS CDK and MongoDB
Strong engineering practices: TDD, pairing, CI/CD, trunk-based development
concerns: Vitest not mentioned (testing experience appears general, not framework-specific)
Heavy DLang focus in some past roles may indicate divergence from the core JS/TS stack
